query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl NOT IN ('not-found','skipped','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN amazonUrl IS NOT NULL AND amazonUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_amazon_url,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IN ('not-found','skipped') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cover_failed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NULL OR coverImageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cover_missing
FROM book_profiles;
